---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a focused improvement for maintainer discussion
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem or Use Case

Describe the problem this proposal would solve and who would benefit.

## Proposed Change

Describe the smallest practical improvement.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe existing approaches or alternatives you considered.

## Scope and Impact

Identify affected components, possible dependencies, and compatibility considerations.

## Additional Context

Do not begin major implementation work until the proposal has been discussed with the maintainer. Acceptance and scheduling remain subject to the maintainer-led roadmap.
